access_logs.description: Details about the access logs for the load balancer, including the bucket name, whether logging is enabled, and the log prefix.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the load balancer.

arn_suffix.description: The suffix of the load balancer's ARN.

client_keep_alive.description: The duration the load balancer should keep the connection alive with the client.

connection_logs.description: Details about the connection logs for the load balancer, including the bucket name, whether logging is enabled, and the log prefix.

customer_owned_ipv4_pool.description: The ID of the customer-owned IPv4 address pool.

dns_name.description: The DNS name of the load balancer.

dns_record_client_routing_policy.description: The routing policy for client DNS records.

drop_invalid_header_fields.description: Indicates if the load balancer should drop invalid header fields.

enable_cross_zone_load_balancing.description: Enables or disables cross-zone load balancing.

enable_deletion_protection.description: Enables or disables deletion protection for the load balancer.

enable_http2.description: Indicates if HTTP/2 is enabled for the load balancer.

enable_tls_version_and_cipher_suite_head.description: Indicates if TLS version and cipher suite headers are enabled.

enable_waf_fail_open.description: Indicates if the WAF fail-open feature is enabled.

enable_xff_client_port.description: Indicates if the XFF client port is enabled.

enable_zonal_shift.description: Enables or disables zonal shift for the load balancer.

enforce_security_group_inbound_rules_on_.description: Enforces security group inbound rules on private link traffic.

id.description: The ID of the load balancer.

idle_timeout.description: The amount of time to wait before closing idle connections.

internal.description: Indicates if the load balancer is internal.

ip_address_type.description: The type of IP address used by the load balancer.

load_balancer_type.description: The type of the load balancer (e.g., application or network).

name.description: The name of the load balancer.

preserve_host_header.description: Indicates if the load balancer preserves the original host header.

security_groups.description: The security groups associated with the load balancer.

subnet_mapping.description: Information about subnet mappings for the load balancer.

subnets.description: The subnets associated with the load balancer.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the load balancer.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC for the load balancer.

xff_header_processing_mode.description: The processing mode for the X-Forwarded-For header.

zone_id.description: The ID of the zone where the load balancer is located.
